Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.

When I say Pengu Morning and you say it back A year ago, I bought my first . Today, I finally became a holder.  Honestly, this feels like a dream come true. Huge love to the Pudgy community for building one of the most positive corners of Web3. Does the Pudgy flock follow its own? SnoopDoge Striving for excellence here at Nominated and won a Webby. Cheers to the next ones
